title: koeleria cristata var. glauca
intro: Koeleria cristata var. glauca, also known as glaucous June grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. glauca include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for diabetes and various inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Koeleria cristata var. glauca can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
